memory.summary: I have a free afternoon before the term project deadline, and while I could relax or do a quick chore, the project is barely started.
I spent 0.5 hours on a trivial chore, but my term project remains barely started despite having free time before the deadline.
I made a small start on an easy chore, but my term project remains barely started despite having free time before the deadline.
I made a tiny 0.04 progress on an easy chore, but the term project remains barely started as the afternoon slips away.
I have spent two hours on trivial chores, yet my term project remains barely started while the afternoon continues to slip away.
I've spent over two hours on trivial chores, yet my term project remains barely started as the afternoon slips away.
After another hour on trivial chores, my term project is still barely started as the afternoon slips away.
Despite an hour of progress on a trivial chore, my term project remains barely started as the afternoon continues to slip away.
I've spent four hours on trivial chores with minimal progress, yet my term project remains barely started as the afternoon slips away.
After 1.5 hours on a trivial chore, I've only reached 44% completion while my term project remains untouched.
I spent another half-hour on a trivial chore, yet my term project remains untouched while the evening advances.
I missed the deadline for a trivial chore after reaching only 50% completion, yet my term project remains untouched.
